title: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple].
options.requires: You have no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

notes:
A prideful warrior's restless soul haunts this grave, seeking companionship in battle. The CONFRONT option is locked if the player has no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] in their deck that can be enchanted with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple].

[gold]Accepting[/gold]: The soul recognizes your strength and willingly ascends with you, becoming a loyal guide. You obtain the Forgotten Soul relic and the soul's flames coalesce around you as a [aqua]burning soul[/aqua], escorting you to your final destination.

[gold]Confronting[/gold]: You tell the soul its struggle is over. It contests this truth, crashing into yours in a [jitter][aqua]SOUL FIGHT[/aqua][/jitter]. Stunned by the countless battles you have endured, it finally concedes and moves on. You gain a Decay curse but can [gold]Enchant[/gold] one of your Exhaust cards with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple], a powerful enchantment.
